documents.title: Deployment checklist
documents.content: The deployment checklist asks engineers to confirm migrations, verify environment variables, run smoke tests, and watch service health for ten minutes after release.

documents.title: Customer feedback synthesis
documents.content: The feedback synthesis notes that users want clearer import status, fewer duplicate notifications, and better summaries for long-running background tasks.

documents.title: Incident review template
documents.content: The incident review template captures timeline, detected impact, contributing factors, corrective actions, and follow-up owners.

queries.query: what should engineers verify after release
expectedChunkContains: watch service health for ten minutes

queries.query: which document tracks corrective actions and owners
what customer feedback mentioned duplicate notifications
